---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea to improve SeeQ
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem it solves

Is this related to a problem in the current SeeQ workflow? Describe it in one or two sentences.

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature in detail:
- What would the user do differently?
- Where in the code/UI would this appear?
- Any interaction with the TX safety rules or control-operator responsibility?

## Alternatives considered

Have you thought of other ways to solve this? Briefly describe them.

## Safety / operational notes

If your feature touches:
- TX, keying, or frequency control
- The watchdog or PTT release logic
- Attended-operation gates

Please note that. (These parts are frozen code and require extra review.)

## Examples

Paste screenshots, output examples, or describe what the feature would look like in action.

## Acceptance

How would we know this feature is done? A short checklist:

- [ ] Feature implemented
- [ ] Code follows existing style (bash, Python, comments)
- [ ] Unit tests pass (`make test`)
- [ ] README or CLAUDE.md updated if user-facing
